channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Richardson scores 21 as No. 14 Michigan State tops No. 12 Michigan 75-62 for 1st place in Big Ten
item.description: Jase Richardson scored 21 points and Tre Holloman had 18, leading No. 14 Michigan State to a 75-62 win over No. 12 Michigan to take sole possession of first place in the Big Ten.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan agrees to multiyear contract extension with coach Dusty May during successful debut season
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Michigan announced a multiyear contract extension for Dusty May a couple hours before No. 14 Michigan State beat the 12th-ranked Wolverines 75-62 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL investigating Justin Tucker's sexual misconduct allegations, interviewing accusers: reports
item.description: The NFL has reportedly been interviewing Justin Tucker's sexual misconduct accusers during its own investigation. Tucker has kicked for the Baltimore Ravens 13 seasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donovan Mitchell and Evan Mobley power East-leading Cavaliers to 142-105 blowout of Knicks
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 27 points, Evan Mobley added 21 and the Cleveland Cavaliers bullied the New York Knicks from the start, winning 142-105 in a matchup of two of the East's best teams.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off shatters expectations as a hockey showcase. The Milan Olympics are up next
item.description: Canada won the 4 Nations Face-Off by beating the United States for the championship in an overtime thriller capped off by Connor McDavid's memorable goal that will be on highlight reels for decades to come.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mark Williams' agent says center 'should have been a given an opportunity' to play for Lakers
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The agent for Charlotte Hornets center Mark Williams says the Los Angeles Lakers shouldn't have failed his client’s physical examination, a move that ultimately resulted in the trade being rescinded after the deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Girls Soccer: Westview 3, Eastlake 1
item.description: Open Division girls soccer match between Westview and Eastlake to see who goes on to the next round of playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Jaguars hire Rams' James Gladstone as GM, reuniting him with coach Liam Coen
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Los Angeles Rams executive James Gladstone as their general manager Friday, reuniting him with new coach Liam Coen. Gladstone held the position of director of scouting strategy in L.A.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Roki Sasaki reveals marriage in social media post during Dodgers camp, like Shohei Ohtani last year
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Japanese phenom Roki Sasaki has revealed that he is married, something that even caught Los Angeles Dodgers manager Dave Roberts by surprise. “What? I didn't know he had a girlfriend,” Roberts responded Friday when asked if he had gotten Sasaki a wedding gift.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New York Yankees drop ban on beards, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner
item.description: TAMPA. Fla. (AP) — The New York Yankees dropped their ban on beards Friday, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner, in a move aimed to improve player recruitment as the team tries to win its first World Series title since 2009.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump spars with Maine's governor at the White House over transgender athletes
item.description: President Donald Trump has sparred with Maine’s governor during a meeting of governors at the White House.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Yankees change long-standing facial hair policy in stunning move
item.description: The New York Yankees have altered their long-standing facial hair policy, announcing Friday that players will now be allowed to sport "well-groomed beards.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For Dominican baseball hopefuls, age fraud cases and a curveball from Japan reflect a broken system
item.description: BANÍ, Dominican Republic (AP) — There was little sleep in the days leading up to Jan. 15. Dozens of teenage baseball players across the Dominican Republic lay in bed, unable to close their eyes.
item.dc:creator: DÁNICA COTO and MARTÍN ADAMES ALCÁNTARA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Wembanyama's season now over, the Spurs and the basketball world wait for what's next
item.description: The French sports newspaper L’Equipe published a photo of Victor Wembanyama across the entirety of its front page on Friday, the San Antonio star looking down with his hands on his hips. “Coup D’Arret” was the headline in big, white letters. The translation, in this case, means Knockout Blow.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Rock says he will show up on 'SmackDown' with road to WrestleMania 41 underway
item.description: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson announced on Thursday night that he will make his return to SmackDown in midst of the road to WrestleMania 41.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
